name: John Lennon
bio: John Lennon's solo catalog stays valuable because a small number of universally recognized songs continue to drive streaming, publishing, and sync-style emotional reuse.
notable_for: A compact but exceptionally recognizable solo catalog led by Imagine and Starting Over.
career_highlight: Imagine remains one of the most durable writer-led songs in the modern catalog economy.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes Imagine dominates annual catalog economics and that songwriter-side value materially strengthens retained earnings.

ownership.master_owner: Legacy label-side control is assumed for core masters
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and estate-side publishing participation is assumed
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No new catalog sale adjustment is modeled here
ownership.notes: Annual economics are driven by a very small number of globally recognized songs rather than broad-volume catalog depth.
